title: glochidion chamaecerasus
intro: Glochidion chamaecerasus, also known as the yellow bengkudu, is a species of plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
